title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 09 2025
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 09 2025
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 09 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/01/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures opened lower but moved higher throughout the day, fluctuating upward. The most-traded I2505 contract finallyclosed at 754.5 yuan/mt, up 0.53% for the day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm for selling, while steel mills purchased as needed.
